title: Colorado 2024 General Election RLA Analysis
description: Risk-limiting audit analysis for 725 contests across 63 counties

colorado_rla.description_html:
This database contains both original auditcenter CSV data and computed analysis results.

📍 Start here: Contest Risk Analysis to see audit results
🔍 Find discrepancies: Ballots with consensus=NO

contest_risk_analysis.title: 📊 Contest Risk Analysis (Analysis Results)
contest_risk_analysis.description: ✱ COMPUTED - Risk calculations for all targeted and opportunistic contests. Shows whether each contest met the 3% risk limit.

columns.contest_ballot_card_count: Total ballot cards containing this contest
columns.sample_size: Ballots in uniform sample after downsampling

county_sampling_details.title: 📋 County Sampling Breakdown (Analysis Results)
county_sampling_details.description: ✱ COMPUTED - Per-county sampling details for each contest

columns.examined_total: Total ballots examined in county (all contests)
columns.had_fake_ballot: 1 if contest appears but zero observed
columns.ballot_ids: JSON array of ballot imprinted_ids used

audit_metadata.title: ⚙️ Audit Configuration
audit_metadata.description: Risk limit, gamma, and analysis metadata

vote_totals.title: 🗳️ Reported Election Results (tabulate.csv, tabulateCounty.csv)
vote_totals.description: ✱ ORIGINAL - Reported election results by contest and county. Source: tabulate.csv (state-wide totals) and tabulateCounty.csv (county-level totals). These are the results being audited.

ballot_comparisons.title: 🔍 Ballot Comparisons (contestComparison.csv)
ballot_comparisons.description: ✱ ORIGINAL - Side-by-side CVR vs audit board interpretations. Filter by consensus=NO to see discrepancies. Source: contestComparison.csv from each round.

contests.title: 🏛️ Contests (contest.csv)
contests.description: ✱ ORIGINAL - Contest definitions with metadata, margins, and discrepancy counts from round data. Source: contest.csv from each round.

counties.title: 📍 Counties (from ballot manifests)
counties.description: ✱ ORIGINAL - County information with ballot card counts. Derived from county manifest CSV files.

ballot_manifests.title: 📦 Ballot Manifests (county CSVs)
ballot_manifests.description: ✱ ORIGINAL - Batch-level manifest data for each county. 47K batches across 63 counties totaling 4.7M ballots. Source: *BallotManifest.csv files in ballotManifests/ directory.

contest_counties.title: 🔗 Contest Counties (contestsByCounty.csv)
contest_counties.description: Mapping of which counties participate in which contests. Source: contestsByCounty.csv.

audit_random_seed.title: 🎲 Random Seed (seed.csv)
audit_random_seed.description: ✱ ORIGINAL - Cryptographic seed for random ballot selection. Critical for verifying audit was truly random. Source: seed.csv.

discrepancies.title: 🔴 All Discrepancies (consensus=NO)
discrepancies.description: Find all ballots where audit board disagreed with CVR interpretation
discrepancies.sql:
SELECT 
  bc.imprinted_id,
  bc.round,
  c.name as contest_name,
  co.name as county_name,
  bc.cvr_choice,
  bc.audit_choice,
  bc.consensus
FROM ballot_comparisons bc
JOIN contests c ON bc.contest_id = c.contest_id
JOIN counties co ON bc.county_id = co.county_id
WHERE bc.consensus = 'NO'
ORDER BY bc.round DESC, c.name

high_risk_contests.title: ⚠️ High Risk Contests (risk_value > 0.03)
high_risk_contests.description: Contests that failed to achieve the 3% risk limit. Excludes contests with margin=0 (uncontested or single-candidate wins risk=1.0).
high_risk_contests.sql:
SELECT 
  contest_name,
  audit_reason,
  risk_value,
  discrepancies,
  sample_size,
  achieved_risk_limit
FROM contest_risk_analysis
WHERE achieved_risk_limit = 0
  AND min_margin != 0
ORDER BY risk_value DESC

critical_risk.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Risk Level Above 1.00
critical_risk.description: Contests where audit actually INCREASED risk! Risk > 1.0 means the evidence makes the outcome LESS certain than before the audit.
critical_risk.sql:
SELECT 
  contest_name,
  audit_reason,
  risk_value,
  discrepancies,
  sample_size,
  two_vote_over_count,
  one_vote_over_count
FROM contest_risk_analysis
WHERE risk_value > 1.0
ORDER BY risk_value DESC

opportunistic_passing.title: ✅ Opportunistic Contests Passing (< 3% risk)
opportunistic_passing.description: Opportunistic contests that achieved the risk limit
opportunistic_passing.sql:
SELECT 
  contest_name,
  risk_value,
  discrepancies,
  sample_size,
  counties_involved
FROM contest_risk_analysis
WHERE audit_reason = 'opportunistic_benefits'
  AND achieved_risk_limit = 1
ORDER BY risk_value ASC

presidential_votes.title: 🇺🇸 Presidential Election Results
presidential_votes.description: Vote totals for Presidential Electors contest
presidential_votes.sql:
SELECT 
  choice,
  SUM(CASE WHEN county_id IS NULL THEN votes ELSE 0 END) as state_votes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN county_id IS NOT NULL THEN votes ELSE 0 END) as county_votes
FROM vote_totals
WHERE contest_id IN (SELECT contest_id FROM contests WHERE name = 'Presidential Electors')
GROUP BY choice
ORDER BY state_votes DESC

multi_county_contests.title: 🌍 Multi-County Contests
multi_county_contests.sql:
SELECT 
  c.name as contest_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cc.county_id) as num_counties,
  SUBSTR(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT co.name), 1, 100) || CASE WHEN LENGTH(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT co.name)) > 100 THEN '...' ELSE '' END as sample_counties
FROM contests c
JOIN contest_counties cc ON c.contest_id = cc.contest_id
JOIN counties co ON cc.county_id = co.county_id
GROUP BY c.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cc.county_id) > 1
ORDER BY num_counties DESC

largest_discrepancies_by_contest.title: 📊 Discrepancy Count by Contest
largest_discrepancies_by_contest.description: Summary of discrepancies per contest from round metadata
largest_discrepancies_by_contest.sql:
SELECT 
  name as contest_name,
  round,
  (COALESCE(two_vote_over_count, 0) + COALESCE(one_vote_over_count, 0) + 
   COALESCE(one_vote_under_count, 0) + COALESCE(two_vote_under_count, 0)) as discrepancy_count,
  two_vote_over_count,
  one_vote_over_count,
  one_vote_under_count,
  two_vote_under_count
FROM contests
WHERE (COALESCE(two_vote_over_count, 0) + COALESCE(one_vote_over_count, 0) + 
       COALESCE(one_vote_under_count, 0) + COALESCE(two_vote_under_count, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY discrepancy_count DESC
